question.label: Execution details
question.name: Execution details — what keeps pulling you back into them?
question.description: Drills into the specific forces keeping Ahmed in tactical work instead of higher-level scope.

answer: When conversations get political, I tend to retreat to what I can deliver directly.

assessment.note: Retreating into direct delivery when conversations turn political signals a strong growth blocker around influence at senior scope.

history.answer_excerpt: I know I want bigger scope, but I still spend too much time in execution details.
